full_text:
Agui йҳҝиІҙ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Agui (йҳҝиІҙ)was born in Di. Joined allies Qianwan and Ma Chao in AD 213. Defeated and killed by Xiahou Yuan. Agui was affiliated with Xingguo Di and Ma Chao. Agui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
